properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord lead us into battle, Let us glorify your name. Holy Spirit you have set our hearts aflame. We will never be the same.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh how I love you Jesus. What a joy to sing your praise. I have placed my hope in You and You alone. I've found healing in your name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord fill us with the vision To see the church as one Break our hearts, release us from our pride. Father glorify your bride.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord teach us how to worship. May it never be in vain Draw us into the throne room of the King In your power rule and reign.
